title: Weekly golf club results
description: GOLF NEWS - The Graaff-Reinet Golf Club once...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - The Graaff-Reinet Golf Club once again hosted a successful competition last Saturday.","html":"GOLF NEWS - The Graaff-Reinet Golf Club once again hosted a successful competition last Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"IPS","html":"IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["1st: Derek Light 38","2nd: Cherryl Waddelow 37","3rd: Frikkie Coetzee 36","Two Clubs was won by Jacques Wagener."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundowner IPS","html":"Sundowner IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["1st: Ather Short 20","2nd: Eddie Nel 18","3rd: Harold Steven-Jennings 18"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bonus Bogey","html":"Bonus Bogey"},{"type":"list","items":["A Div: Pieter Meyer 41","B Div: Bernie Weyer 39","C Div: Kenny Eaton 36"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two Club Winners: Colin Warner, Jacques Wagener, Johndre Ludick, Neil Dodds and Dan Yeadon.","html":"Two Club Winners: Colin Warner, Jacques Wagener, Johndre Ludick, Neil Dodds and Dan Yeadon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
